## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Walkthrough submissions include author attribution in `guides.json`
- [ ] New guides have a `meta.json` with `title` and `author`
- [ ] If adding a feature, CSP headers are included
- [ ] `guide/` or `guides/` changes only — no unrelated files
